# Ramy Aboulnaga

> Full Stack Software Engineer specializing in Go and Ruby development

## About

Ramy Aboulnaga (also known as RaMin0) is a Full Stack Software Engineer based in Cairo, Egypt. He specializes in backend development with Go (Golang) and Ruby on Rails, with additional expertise in JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, Docker, and Kubernetes.

## Contact

- Website: https://ramy.aboulna.ga
- GitHub: https://github.com/ramin0
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/ramin0
- YouTube: https://youtube.com/RamyAboulNaga

## Skills

- Languages: Go, Ruby, JavaScript, TypeScript, Python
- Frameworks: Ruby on Rails, React
- Infrastructure: Docker, Kubernetes, Cloud platforms
- Databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis
- APIs: REST, GraphQL

## Content

### Educational Videos

Ramy creates programming tutorials and live coding sessions on YouTube:

- **Building a Twelve-Factor App**: A 6-part series on modern application development practices
- **Coding in Go (Arabic)**: A 19-episode series teaching Go programming in Arabic
- **Live Streams**: Regular live coding sessions covering various programming topics

Full CV available at: https://ramy.aboulna.ga/cv
